hero.subtitle: A transparent AI tool that detects thyroid conditions and explains every decision — so patients and doctors can trust the result.

problem.heading: The Silent Epidemic
problem.subheading: Thyroid disorders are everywhere. Most go undetected.
problem.stat1_desc: People worldwide affected by thyroid disorders
problem.stat2_desc: Remain undiagnosed due to vague symptoms
problem.stat3_desc: Women will develop a thyroid disorder in their lifetime
problem.para: Symptoms like fatigue, weight change, and mood shifts are easy to dismiss. Without an AI-powered second opinion, many cases slip through undetected — especially in rural and low-resource settings.

how_it_works.heading: How XAI Thyroid Works
how_it_works.subheading: From blood test values to trusted diagnosis in seconds.

conditions.heading: Three Outcomes. One Tool.
conditions.hypo_symptoms: Fatigue, weight gain, cold intolerance, depression
conditions.hyper_symptoms: Anxiety, weight loss, palpitations, heat intolerance

demo.heading: See It In Action
demo.subheading: Try a sample diagnosis without logging in.

trust.heading: Transparency You Can Rely On
trust.feat1_desc: Not a black box. SHAP shows exactly which blood values drove the prediction.
trust.feat2_desc: Color-coded waterfall charts make reasoning visible to both doctors and patients.
trust.feat3_desc: Available in English, Hindi, Kannada, Tamil, French, and Spanish.
trust.feat4_desc: OWASP-compliant backend. Your health data never leaves your account.

cta_section.heading: Start Your Diagnosis Today
cta_section.subheading: Free to use. No data sold. Designed with doctors.

diagnose.heading: Patient Input
diagnose.placeholder: Your diagnosis result will appear here.

result.borderline_warn: Borderline case — model is uncertain. Clinical correlation recommended.
result.disclaimer: This is an AI-generated prediction. Please consult a qualified doctor for a confirmed diagnosis.

dashboard.heading: Your Diagnosis History
dashboard.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this record?

chatbot.title: Thyroid Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hello! I can answer your thyroid health questions. What would you like to know?
chatbot.error: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.

footer.disclaimer: Not a substitute for clinical diagnosis. Always consult a healthcare professional.

errors.password_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, number, and special character.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
